sections.title: Executive Summary
sections.rendered_content:
AMG posted $2.07B in revenue (1.6% YoY) and $717M in net income (40.1% YoY) for 2025-12-31. The profitability profile is defined by net margin of 34.5%, framing the earnings quality behind the headline figures.

Cash generation is anchored by $973M in operating cash flow (4.4% YoY), which converts to $967M in free cash flow (4.1% YoY). Capital expenditures of $6.1M (0.3% of revenue) show the reinvestment burden required to sustain the current operating base. The conversion of earnings into operating cash flow suggests the reported result is supported by cash generation rather than dominated by accruals.

sections.title: Trend Analysis
sections.rendered_content:
### Capital Expenditures
Capital Expenditures is currently $6.1M with -12.5% CAGR. Capital Expenditures has declined at a -12.5% CAGR.

### Net Income
Net Income is currently $717M with 4.7% CAGR. Net Income has grown at a 4.7% CAGR.

### Total Liabilities
Total Liabilities is currently $4.79B with 3.1% CAGR. Total Liabilities has grown at a 3.1% CAGR.

### Total Stockholders' Equity
Total Stockholders' Equity is currently $4.18B with -0.7% CAGR. Total Stockholders' Equity has been roughly flat.
